activities.title: Treasure Hunting at Sleepy Poet
activities.description: Navigate a sprawling labyrinth of vintage treasures, retro fashion, and oddities that define the city's quirky undercurrent. It is an adventurous morning excursion perfect for finding unique pieces of Charlotte history.
activities.location: Sleepy Poet Antique Mall, South Blvd

activities.title: Custom Spirits at Idlewild
activities.description: Describe your preferences and let expert bartenders build a custom drink just for you in this cozy, menu-less NoDa gem. It is the ultimate destination for adventurous drinkers seeking a personal, high-quality social experience.

activities.title: Refined Southern Dining at Haberdish
activities.description: Feast on elevated Southern staples in an airy, industrial-chic space that captures the refined soul of NoDa. The comforting food and social atmosphere make it a baseline essential for an authentic dinner.

activities.title: Acoustic Open Mic at The Evening Muse
activities.description: Witness raw local talent in NoDa’s premier listening room. The atmosphere is intimate and focused, making it the perfect spot for a midweek cultural deep-dive without the club noise.

activities.title: Retro Gaming at Super Abari
activities.description: Relive the golden age of arcades with rare cabinets and classic pinball in a massive, high-energy warehouse. It is a social playground for competitive spirits who prefer joysticks over dance floors.
activities.location: Super Abari Game Bar, Optimist Park

activities.title: Dinner in the Garden at Goodyear House
activities.description: Dine under the massive holly tree in this converted historic home that blends high-design with approachable Southern comfort. The social energy here is unmatched, representing the peak of NoDa dining.

activities.title: Lakeside Escape to Hello, Sailor
activities.description: Take a short drive North for a mid-century modern dockside experience featuring fish camp vibes and citrusy cocktails. It is a stylish, adventurous getaway that feels worlds away from the city center.

activities.title: Pint & Peanuts at Birdsong Brewing
activities.description: Lean into the unpretentious NoDa baseline at this solar-powered brewery. It’s the ultimate chill social spot where the inclusive vibe is as consistent as the Higher Ground IPA.

activities.title: Morning Hike at Crowders Mountain
activities.description: Take the short drive for a rugged ascent with a rewarding panoramic view of the Charlotte skyline. It’s the definitive adventurous fitness baseline for locals seeking a vertical challenge.

activities.title: Art & Lager at Resident Culture
activities.description: Immerse yourself in a brewery that feels like a street-art gallery, known for its world-class hazies and funky atmosphere. It’s a cornerstone of the Plaza Midwood social identity.
activities.location: Resident Culture Brewing Co, Plaza Midwood

activities.title: Garden Cocktails at Dilworth Tasting Room
activities.description: Unwind in one of the most beautiful hidden courtyards in the city. This elevated social baseline in Dilworth is perfect for a sophisticated Tuesday evening with a Mediterranean-inspired menu.

activities.title: Market Vibes at 7th Street Public Market
activities.description: Start your Wednesday in the center of Uptown’s culinary hub. It is the definitive urban baseline for grabbing local provisions while soaking in the energy of the city’s professional core.

activities.title: Skyline Views at Merchant & Trade
activities.description: Sip elevated cocktails nineteen floors up with a panoramic view of the Uptown skyline. This sophisticated baseline is the premier spot for a social night out before exploring the late-night scene.

activities.title: Crate Digging at Lunchbox Records
activities.description: Navigate the aisles of this world-class independent record store for rare vinyl and local releases. It is a gritty, authentic cultural baseline for music lovers and local collectors alike.

activities.title: Speakeasy Sips at Dot Dot Dot
activities.description: Enter through a secret back door for a high-end, member-only cocktail experience in a mid-century lounge. It represents the secretive, upscale baseline of Charlotte's sophisticated social hierarchy.

activities.title: Fresh Finds at Regional Farmers Market
activities.description: Explore stalls of local produce and artisan goods at one of the largest markets in the state. It is an adventurous morning baseline that connects you with the region's agricultural roots.
activities.location: Charlotte Regional Farmers Market, West Charlotte

activities.title: Night Cap at Soul Gastrolounge
activities.description: Experience the high-energy return of a city legend featuring inventive sushi and fusion small plates. It is a premier social baseline for the city's trendy and adventurous nightlife scene.

activities.title: Burgers at Pinky's Westside Grill
activities.description: Grab a Ding Dong Style burger at this quirky, converted automotive shop in FreeMoreWest. It is a quintessential Charlotte staple known for its diverse crowd and high-energy patio.

activities.title: Concerts at The Fillmore
activities.description: Catch a major touring act in this historic, chandelier-filled music venue. The industrial vibe and high-quality production make it the city's most iconic spot for live performances.

activities.title: The Firebird at Bechtler Museum
activities.description: Take a photo with the iconic 'Disco Chicken' statue before exploring modern art collections inside. This architectural gem is a foundational piece of the Uptown cultural landscape.
activities.location: Bechtler Museum of Modern Art, Uptown

activities.title: Summit Coffee Highland Creek Run
activities.description: Start your day with a refreshing group run through Highland Creek. It's a great way to meet local runners and enjoy the morning air, fostering community and fitness.
activities.location: Summit Coffee Highland Creek, Highland Creek

activities.title: ArtBreak at Mint Museum Randolph
activities.description: Enjoy a free, insightful lunch-time tour at Mint Museum Randolph. This is a perfect cultural break in your day to explore art and history in a relaxed setting.

activities.title: Educational Tree Walk at The Green
activities.description: Take a guided educational tree walk in The Green, learning about Charlotte's urban forestry and local flora. A peaceful afternoon activity in the heart of Uptown.

activities.title: SouthPark After 5: Bourbon Sons
activities.description: Wind down your afternoon with live music from Bourbon Sons at Symphony Park. This popular outdoor concert series is perfect for a relaxed evening with friends.

activities.title: Thursdays on the Turf
activities.description: Enjoy another free live music series at Commonwealth Plaza Midwood. Grab a spot on the turf, soak in the good vibes, and enjoy performances from local artists.

activities.title: Board Game Night at Hi-Wire Brewing
activities.description: Challenge your friends or make new ones at Hi-Wire Brewing's free board game night. Enjoy craft beers while diving into some friendly competition in a lively taproom.

activities.title: Disney Trivia at Neoteric Brewing Company
activities.description: Test your Disney knowledge at this fun, free trivia night. Gather your team and compete for prizes while enjoying local brews in a casual brewery atmosphere.
activities.location: Neoteric Brewing Company, Lower South End

activities.title: Karaoke Night with DJ Windsor at Bar Argon
activities.description: Belt out your favorite tunes at Charlotte's premier LGBTQ+ video bar. It's a free, inclusive space to sing, dance, and celebrate your true self with a welcoming crowd.

activities.title: Summit Coffee OTP Run
activities.description: Join the Charlotte Running Club for their morning run from Summit Coffee OTP. A fantastic start to your Friday, connecting with the running community and enjoying the outdoors.

activities.title: Tuck Fest (Admission) at USNWC
activities.description: Head to the U.S. National Whitewater Center for the start of Tuck Fest. Enjoy the festival atmosphere, live music, and vendor village with free admission.
activities.location: U.S. National Whitewater Center, West Charlotte

activities.title: Greater Charlotte Book Crawl
activities.description: Explore various independent bookstores across Charlotte as part of the free Greater Charlotte Book Crawl. A perfect day for book lovers to discover new reads and local shops.

activities.title: Ladybug Weekend at Pike Nurseries
activities.description: Get free ladybugs with any purchase at Pike Nurseries, a fun and eco-friendly event for gardening enthusiasts. A unique pop-up for nature lovers.

activities.title: Charlotte Water Outreach at Knights Game
activities.description: Visit the Charlotte Water outreach booth at the Charlotte Knights game. Learn about water conservation and community efforts (free with game admission).

activities.title: Music Bingo at Primal Brewery, Huntersville
activities.description: Kick off your Friday evening with free music bingo. Enjoy good tunes, friendly competition, and local brews in a relaxed brewery atmosphere.

activities.title: Trivia at The Suffolk Punch South End
activities.description: Put your general knowledge to the test at this free trivia night. A relaxed and engaging way to spend your Friday evening with friends over food and drinks.

activities.title: Friday Night Live at Hi-Wire Brewing Charlotte
activities.description: Enjoy free live music at Hi-Wire Brewing. A great spot to unwind with friends, enjoy local talent, and sample a variety of craft beers.

activities.title: Charlotte Latino Film Festival
activities.description: Immerse yourself in Latin American storytelling with a screening at the Independent Picture House. Tickets are affordable for a rich cultural experience, showcasing diverse films.

activities.title: Ramona and The Holy Smokes at The Evening Muse
activities.description: Catch an intimate live music performance by Ramona and The Holy Smokes with opener Rebecca Porter. A great way to discover local talent in a cozy, respected music venue.

activities.title: Mo Betta Thursdays at Great Wagon Road Distilling Co.
activities.description: Enjoy a night of live music and good spirits at Great Wagon Road Distilling Company. This event offers a relaxed atmosphere perfect for unwinding with friends.
activities.location: Great Wagon Road Distilling Company, LoSo

activities.title: Night Class – Unserious Powerpoint Assembly
activities.description: Experience a unique and hilarious comedy/variety show where performers present on absurd topics. A truly "weird" and entertaining queer-friendly night out at Petra's Bar.

activities.title: Queer Comedy Showcase at The Rabbit Hole
activities.description: Laugh out loud at a special queer comedy showcase featuring local and regional LGBTQ+ comedians. Expect sharp wit and diverse perspectives in a lively, inclusive setting.

activities.title: Drag Bingo & Brews at Divine Barrel Brewing
activities.description: Join a fabulous drag queen for an evening of bingo, laughs, and craft beer. Expect exciting prizes, dazzling performances, and a guaranteed good time in a fun brewery setting.

activities.title: Indie Film Screening & Discussion at Visart Video
activities.description: Discover an independent film followed by a lively discussion with local film enthusiasts. A great opportunity for cinephiles to connect and explore new cinematic perspectives.

activities.title: Craft Cocktail Workshop at Dot Dot Dot
activities.description: Learn to mix classic and contemporary cocktails from expert bartenders in a hands-on workshop. Elevate your home bartending skills in this intimate speakeasy setting.

activities.title: Microwave at The Underground
activities.description: Catch indie rock band Microwave live at The Underground. An energetic show in a popular Charlotte music venue, perfect for fans of alternative music.

activities.title: Cirque du Biere: Millennial Core Aerial Show
activities.description: Be amazed by aerial performances and acrobatic feats at this unique brewery show at Hi-Wire Brewing. A captivating and entertaining evening blending art and craft beer.

activities.title: Menagerie: An Audiovisual Drag Experience at Petra's Bar
activities.description: Dive into an unfiltered audiovisual drag experience at Petra's. A bold collision of art, sound, and performance, featuring incredible drag artists in a queer-friendly space.

activities.title: Queer Dance Party: Neon Nights at Snug Harbor
activities.description: Dance the night away at this vibrant queer dance party with a neon theme. Expect electrifying beats from a guest DJ and a welcoming atmosphere in a beloved Plaza Midwood spot.

activities.title: Drag Queen Story Hour (Adult Edition) at Park Road Books
activities.description: Enjoy a hilarious and heartwarming adult-oriented Drag Queen Story Hour, complete with readings and witty banter. A unique and queer-friendly literary event in a cozy bookstore.

activities.title: Local Artist Showcase & Sip at Goodyear Arts
activities.description: Explore new works by emerging Charlotte artists at this gallery showcase. Mingle with creators, enjoy diverse art, and sip on affordable drinks in a vibrant arts collective space.

activities.title: Themed Cocktail Class: Tiki Takeover at Billy Sunday
activities.description: Learn to craft exotic tiki cocktails in a fun, interactive class led by expert mixologists. Perfect for a unique Friday night experience with a small cover charge and delicious drinks.
